title: Bethesda confirms development of Fallout 5, remasters of Fallout 3 and New Vegas, and focus on The Elder Scrolls 6
summary: Todd Howard and Bethesda detail their roadmap with new games, remasters, and continued support for Starfield.

title: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse receives positive first impressions from the specialized press
summary: The game's previews describe it as a return to classic action with inspiration from the Netflix anime.

title: The video game industry faces a wave of layoffs and labor protests
summary: Studios like ZA/UM and large companies like Google and Microsoft are singled out for staff cuts, while workers organize.

title: God of War live-action series suffers a setback: the actor playing Kratos is injured and must be replaced
summary: Ryan Hurst has an accident during filming, forcing Prime Video to look for a new protagonist.

title: Doom director denies that id Software was decimated by Xbox cuts
summary: Hugo Martin assures that the team remains intact and that Doom: The Dark Ages is progressing as planned.

title: EA faces controversies over advertising, microtransactions, and the purchase by Saudi Arabia
summary: From regulatory approval of the purchase to statements by the vice president of ads, EA makes headlines.

title: A24 faces criticism for claiming rights to Backrooms art that doesn't belong to them
summary: The film's director and the community defend the artists affected by the copyright takedowns.

title: Battlefield 6 incorporates a mode inspired by Top Gun and the classic Carrier Assault
summary: The temporary update adds planes and a gameplay mode that revives the franchise's nostalgia.

title: GTA 6 breaks pre-order records even though it won't come to PC at launch, say analysts
summary: Pre-sale figures reach $260 million, but the lack of a PC version sparks debate.

title: Marathon loses its director and announces a limited-time experimental PvE mode
summary: Bungie's game suffers the departure of its creative director while preparing a multiplayer test for July.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 faces controversy over its Gunny assistant and a bug in the first trailer
summary: The developers deny that Gunny is a chatbot, while they fix an annoying flash on the screen.

title: GameStop CEO declares physical format is irrelevant to the business
summary: Ryan Cohen says physical software accounts for less than 12% of the company's sales.

title: PlayStation fans protest the removal of the disc in the Marvel's Wolverine trailer
summary: Sony's decision to bet on the digital format angers players, who express it on social media.

title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic remake aims for a 2028 release
summary: Sabre Interactive confirms that the project is still in development with a possible release window.

title: The 'Pitch Black' set arrives in Pokémon TCG Live while a collector finds the packs but suffers a theft
summary: The physical and digital expansion of the Pokémon Trading Card Game generates conflicting news.

title: Magic: The Gathering announces its 2027 schedule and a collaboration with Stardew Valley
summary: The card game expands its universe with new sets and a special collection from the popular video game.

title: Fortnite releases Chapter 3 Season 7 with new events and the arrival of Matt Damon
summary: The update includes special powers, DC characters, and the addition of the actor to the game.

title: Steam offers free games this weekend and police arrest a cryptocurrency scammer
summary: Valve's platform makes news for its promotions and the arrest of a man who stole $220,000 through malware in games.

title: Netflix boasts about video game revenue and use of AI in 300 productions
summary: The platform highlights a 600% growth in its gaming division and defends the use of artificial intelligence tools.

title: Overwatch cancels Stadium mode and fails in its attempt to bring back 6v6
summary: Blizzard faces criticism for its decisions about the future of the game, which analysts consider mistakes.
